|cFF00FF00=== Welcome to Azeroth! ===|r\n\n|cFFFFD700Server Features:|r\n- |cFF00FFFFMythic+ Dungeons|r - Scalable endgame challenge\n- |cFF00FFFFTransmog Collection|r - Build your perfect look\n- |cFF00FFFFGlobal Chat|r - Easier group finding and support\n- |cFF00FFFFPlayerBots|r - Keep the world active at all hours\n- |cFF00FFFFPvP Progression|r - Earn titles as you climb\n\n|cFFFF6600Need Help?|r Ask in Global chat and check Discord in the MOTD\n\n|cFF888888Enjoy your stay in Azeroth!|r
